mapper.sql: from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_enterprise_subject s on s.id = bo.subject_id and s.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id left join payment_method m on m.id = po.method_id and m.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_channel c on c.id = po.channel_id and c.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_cashier_config cfg on cfg.id = po.cashier_config_id and cfg.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = po.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = po.tenant_id

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, bo.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.title, bo.app_code as appId, bo.subject_id as subjectId, s.subject_name as subjectName, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, cfg.cashier_name as cashierName, po.method_id as methodId, m.method_code as methodCode, m.method_name as methodName, po.channel_id as channelId, coalesce(po.channel_code, c.channel_code) as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, coalesce(po.channel_merchant_no, cc.merchant_no) as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, cc.contract_name as contractName, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.amount, bo.refunded_amount as refundedAmount, ( coalesce(( select sum(ro.refund_amount) from payment_refund_order ro where ro.tenant_id = po.tenant_id and ro.payment_order_id = po.id and ro.status in ('CREATED', 'REFUNDING', 'PROCESSING', 'SUCCESS') ), 0) + coalesce(( select sum(approval.refund_amount) from payment_refund_approval approval where approval.tenant_id = po.tenant_id and approval.payment_order_id = po.id and approval.status in ('PENDING', 'IN_APPROVAL') and approval.del_flag = 0 ), 0) ) as occupyingRefundAmount, greatest(po.amount - ( coalesce(( select sum(ro.refund_amount) from payment_refund_order ro where ro.tenant_id = po.tenant_id and ro.payment_order_id = po.id and ro.status in ('CREATED', 'REFUNDING', 'PROCESSING', 'SUCCESS') ), 0) + coalesce(( select sum(approval.refund_amount) from payment_refund_approval approval where approval.tenant_id = po.tenant_id and approval.payment_order_id = po.id and approval.status in ('PENDING', 'IN_APPROVAL') and approval.del_flag = 0 ), 0) ), 0) as refundableAmount, bo.currency, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.created_at as createTime, po.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: select count(1)
select count(1) from payment_order po where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.status = 'PAYING'

select coalesce(po.channel_code, c.channel_code, 'UNKNOWN') as channelCode, count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when po.status = 'FAILED' then 1 else 0 end) as failedCount from payment_order po left join payment_channel c on c.id = po.channel_id and c.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.channel_id is not null group by coalesce(po.channel_code, c.channel_code, 'UNKNOWN')
order by po.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select id from payment_order where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{paymentOrderId} and status = 'SUCCESS' and success_flag = 1 for update

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.channel_code = #{channelCode} and po.channel_trade_no = #{channelTradeNo} order by po.created_at desc limit 1

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} limit 1

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po where po.pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} order by po.created_at desc limit 1

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.id = #{id} limit 1

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.status in ('CREATED', 'PAYING') and coalesce(po.success_flag, 0) = 0 and po.channel_code != 'OFFLINE_COLLECTION' and bo.status in ('TO_PAY', 'PAYING') and coalesce(bo.paid_amount, 0) = 0 and bo.expire_time is not null and bo.expire_time <= #{now} order by bo.expire_time asc, po.created_at asc, po.id asc limit #{limit}

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.status = 'PAYING' and coalesce(po.success_flag, 0) = 0 and bo.status = 'PAYING' order by po.updated_at asc, po.created_at asc, po.id asc limit #{limit}

select po.id, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.business_order_id as businessOrderId, po.cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, po.channel_id as channelId, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.channel_merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, po.contract_id as contractId, po.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, po.route_rule_id as routeRuleId, po.method_id as methodId, po.amount, po.status, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, po.success_flag as successFlag, po.pay_time as payTime, po.expire_time as expireTime, po.tenant_id as tenantId, po.created_by as createdBy, po.created_at as createdAt, po.updated_by as updatedBy, po.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_order po where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.channel_code = #{channelCode} and po.contract_id = #{contractId} and po.status = 'SUCCESS' and po.success_flag = 1 and po.pay_time >= #{billDate} and po.pay_time < #{nextBillDate} order by po.pay_time asc, po.pay_order_no asc
mapper.update: update payment_order set status = #{status}, success_flag = #{successFlag}, pay_time = #{payTime}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'PAYING'

update payment_order set status = #{status}, channel_trade_no = #{channelTradeNo}, payment_material_json = #{paymentMaterialJson}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'CREATED'
update payment_order set status = 'FAILED', success_flag = 0, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'CREATED'

update payment_order set status = #{status}, success_flag = #{successFlag}, pay_time = #{payTime}, channel_trade_no = coalesce(channel_trade_no, #{channelTradeNo}), updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'PAYING'

update payment_order set status = 'SUCCESS', success_flag = 1, pay_time = #{payTime}, channel_trade_no = coalesce(channel_trade_no, #{channelTradeNo}), updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and channel_code = 'OFFLINE_COLLECTION' and status = 'PAYING' and coalesce(success_flag, 0) = 0

update payment_order set status = 'SUCCESS', success_flag = 0, pay_time = #{payTime}, channel_trade_no = coalesce(channel_trade_no, #{channelTradeNo}), updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'PAYING'
update payment_order set status = 'DUPLICATE_REFUNDING', success_flag = 0, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'SUCCESS' and coalesce(success_flag, 0) = 0

update payment_order set status = 'DUPLICATE_REFUNDED', success_flag = 0, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'DUPLICATE_REFUNDING' and coalesce(success_flag, 0) = 0
update payment_order set status = 'CLOSED', success_flag = 0, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status in ('CREATED', 'PAYING') and coalesce(success_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select: select po.id as paymentOrderId, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, po.amount, po.status, po.updated_at as updatedAt, po.channel_code as channelCode, po.payment_material_json as paymentMaterialJson, channel.channel_name as channelName, pm.method_code as methodCode, pm.method_name as methodName, pm.payment_material_type as paymentMaterialType, bo.id as businessOrderId, bo.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.app_code as appCode, bo.title as title, bo.subject_id as subjectId, bo.currency, bo.expire_time as expireTime from payment_order po join payment_method pm on pm.id = po.method_id and pm.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_channel channel on channel.id = po.channel_id and channel.tenant_id = po.tenant_id join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} limit 1
